import os
import time
import subprocess

TASKS = [
    'h1hand-walk-v0',
    'h1hand-stand-v0',
    'h1hand-run-v0',
    'h1hand-sit_simple-v0',
    'h1hand-balance_simple-v0',
    'h1hand-reach-v0',
    'h1hand-push-v0',
    'h1hand-pole-v0',
    'h1hand-door-v0',
    'h1hand-package-v0',
]

MAX_STEPS = {'h1hand-push-v0': 500}

if __name__ == '__main__':
    import argparse
    ap = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    ap.add_argument('--steps', type=int, default=500000)
    ap.add_argument('--n_envs', type=int, default=6)
    ap.add_argument('--tasks', nargs='*', default=None)
    args = ap.parse_args()

    tasks = args.tasks if args.tasks else TASKS
    print(f'PPO Training {len(tasks)} tasks for {args.steps} steps each, n_envs={args.n_envs}', flush=True)
    t0 = time.time()

    procs = []
    for task in tasks:
        save_dir = f'ckpt/{task}'
        os.makedirs(save_dir, exist_ok=True)
        os.makedirs('logs', exist_ok=True)
        log_file = f'logs/train_ppo_{task}.log'
        lf = open(log_file, 'w')
        max_s = MAX_STEPS.get(task, 1000)
        p = subprocess.Popen(
            ['python', 'train_ppo.py', '--task', task, '--steps', str(args.steps),
             '--save_dir', save_dir, '--n_envs', str(args.n_envs),
             '--max_steps', str(max_s)],
            stdout=lf, stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
        )
        procs.append((task, p, lf))
        print(f'  launched {task} (pid={p.pid})', flush=True)
        time.sleep(3)

    for task, p, lf in procs:
        rc = p.wait()
        lf.close()
        print(f'  done {task} rc={rc} elapsed={time.time()-t0:.0f}s', flush=True)
    print(f'All done in {time.time()-t0:.0f}s', flush=True)
